candidates.name: Obsidian raw→wiki pipeline pattern
candidates.description: Raw folder staging → LLM-generated wiki → master index. Lightweight alternative to vector RAG.

candidates.name: CLAUDE.md as knowledge traversal controller
candidates.description: CLAUDE.md instructs LLM how to navigate file structure, replacing vector retrieval with path-based lookup.

candidates.name: Obsidian Web Clipper as ingestion tool
candidates.description: Chrome extension for web→markdown ingestion directly to raw folder.

candidates.name: Scale threshold decision framework
candidates.description: Solo/small team <thousands docs = structured markdown sufficient. Millions = proper RAG. Start simple.

candidates.name: Overcomplicating knowledge retrieval
candidates.description: Jumping to vector DBs and embeddings before validating that structured markdown + LLM context works at your scale.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both address code/knowledge comprehension. graphify uses graph topology, this uses markdown file structure. Different scale targets.
